creator: stig_nielsen@hotmail.com
text:
Hi Bugzilla

I am experiencing a problem with the screensaver in x11-wm/cinnamon ( 	x11/cinnamon-screensaver). The problem is that the screensaver will not unlock when I put in my password, instead it says 'Incorrect password'.

I am not sure which info to add, other then I am running 10.2 on amd64 and I have tried pkg upgrade -F.

Please feel free to contact me for mere info or test of an solution.

Regards Stig
